summary: KOLO CRM Complete Feature Verification - All tests PASSED. Modal UI changes verified (X icon top-right, Save button bottom). Login, task creation with date/time/prospect, prospect creation with required email, tab navigation, and settings/password change all working correctly.

issues: React hydration warning for span inside select/option elements - cosmetic, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: Modal 'Add Task' - X icon in top-right corner PRESENT
Modal 'Add Task' - Save button at bottom PRESENT
Modal 'Add Prospect' - X icon in top-right corner PRESENT
Modal 'Add Prospect' - Save button at bottom PRESENT
Task creation with date only - WORKING
Task creation with date and specific time (14:30) - WORKING
Task creation with linked prospect - WORKING
Prospect creation with name, phone, email - WORKING
Email validation on prospect creation - WORKING (422 when missing)
Today tab displays tasks with dates/times - WORKING
Navigation between Today, Prospects, Tasks tabs - WORKING
Password change validation (wrong current, too short) - WORKING
Bearer token authentication for all endpoints - WORKING
critical_code_review_comments: Modal UI correctly implemented: Add Task modal (line 1430-1524 in AppShell.js) has X button in header and Save at bottom
Modal UI correctly implemented: Add Prospect form (line 316-427 in AppShell.js) has X button in header and Save at bottom
Email is required for prospect creation - backend validates with Pydantic EmailStr
Task creation supports date and time via due_date datetime field
Minor: React hydration warning for span inside select element - cosmetic issue from dev tools wrapper

success_rate.backend: 100% (20/20 tests passed - 11 bearer auth + 9 feature verification)

seed_data_creation: Created test tasks and prospects via API during testing: TEST_Task_Date_Only, TEST_Task_With_Time, TEST_Task_With_Prospect, TEST_Prospect_*
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features verified and working. Modal UIs have correct structure (X button top-right, Save bottom). Email is required for prospect creation. Task creation supports date+time via ISO datetime. Navigation between 3 tabs works. Settings page accessible via 'My Profile' button on Today tab. Password change modal works with proper validation.

verified_features.add_task_modal_ui: X icon top-right, Save button bottom, inputs for title/date/time/prospect
verified_features.add_prospect_modal_ui: X icon top-right, Save button bottom, inputs for name/phone/email
verified_features.task_with_datetime: Task creation accepts ISO datetime for date+time
verified_features.prospect_email_required: Backend validates email is present via Pydantic
verified_features.today_tab: Shows tasks due today or overdue with dates/times
verified_features.tab_navigation: Today, Prospects, Tasks tabs navigable via bottom nav
verified_features.settings_page: Accessible via My Profile button, shows profile/billing/about sections
verified_features.password_change: Modal with current/new/confirm password fields, validates input
